NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT HEARING SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR SEP-04-2003 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 206
MINUTES FOR SEP-04-2003 2:00 PM FOR DEPT 206

REMOVED FROM SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR ON SEP-04-2003 IN DEPT. 206. PARTIES ENTERED INTO ORAL STIPULATION FOR SETTLEMENT ON RECORD. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL IS TO PREPARE WRITTEN SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. TRIAL DATE VACATED. JUDGE: OLLIE MARIE-VICTOIRE; CLERK: CRAIG BLACKSTONE; REPORTER: VALERIE PAPALE. (D. 505)

MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR SEP-08-2003 VACATED. CASE SETTLED AT MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ON SEPTEMBER 4, 2003. COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE WRITTEN SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. JUDGE: OLLIE MARIE-VICTOIRE; CLERK: CRAIG BLACKSTONE; REPORTER: VALERIE PAPALE. (D. 505).
FILING FEE FOR STIPULATION AND SETTLEMENT ORDER FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, REGINALD

STIPULATION AND SETTLEMENT ORDER. THE COURT HAVING HEARD THE STIPULATION, FINDS THE PARTIES KNOWINGLY AND VOLUNTARILY ENTERED INTO THE TERMS OF THIS STIPULATION. GOOD CAUSE APPEARING THEREFOR, IT IS ORDERED THAT THE CASE IS SETTLED ACCORDING TO THE TERMS PROVIDED ABOVE. SEE SCANNED DOC. FILED BY WONG, REGINALD
